prompt: Create a polished SFW anime-style illustration of two elegant male characters, Gilgamesh and Enkidu, seated together at a luxury high-rise restaurant at night. Use a wide horizontal 3:2 composition, cinematic warm lighting, detailed linework, glossy rendering, and a refined romantic dinner atmosphere. Show exactly two main characters: on the left, a fair-skinned blond man with short tousled hair, a gold drop earring, a black suit jacket, black shirt, black tie, gold cross-like brooch and chain accessories, holding one stemmed glass of red wine in his left hand while resting his cheek on his right hand; on the right, a fair-skinned androgynous man with very long flowing pale green hair, wearing a white suit with layered white shirt, gold buttons, white gloves, and ornate gold brooch-and-chain jewelry, holding one stemmed glass of red wine near his mouth. Cover each character’s face with a plain opaque square censor block matching muted skin tones, exactly two face-covering squares total, while keeping hair, ears, clothing, hands, and wine glasses visible. The table foreground contains exactly two plated steak dinners, one in front of each character, one glowing cylindrical glass candle holder centered between them, one dark wine bottle at the lower right edge, and one bouquet of white lilies at the lower left. Include exactly two visible red wine glasses being held by the characters. Set the background inside a glamorous restaurant with black-and-gold decor, tall floor-to-ceiling windows, a nighttime city skyline with many lit skyscraper windows, and sparkling crystal chandeliers overhead. Emphasize warm amber highlights, dark reflective surfaces, elegant glassware, intricate fabric folds, rich shadows, and a sophisticated modern fantasy mood. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.
